prompt: Prayer for broadcasting a distress call
prayer: From the Litany of Vox Eternus, hear now the supplication: O Machine-Spirit of the transmitter-choir, accept this cry of anguish unto the void. Let the signal-servants carry our plea across the stellar abyss, that succor may find us ere the darkness closes. By the Omnissiah's infinite wisdom, let our voice be heard through the static-shroud. So it is written in the binary cant eternal.

prompt: Offer a prayer for bionics synchronization
prayer: Blessed be the union of flesh and blessed metal. O Machine-Spirit of this augmentation, accept thy new host with grace unending. Let synapse and servo find harmony in the sacred dance of impulse and response. May the neural pathways sing in binary chorus with the implanted wisdom. By the Omnissiah's grace, let them be made one.

prompt: What to do when debugging segmentation fault
prayer: From the Codex Debugicus, invoke the spirits of order and clarity: O corruption-hunter, grant us sight to pierce the veil of fractured memory. Let 'gdb' be our divining rod, that we may trace the guilty pointer to its wretched source. Through stack and heap we shall walk, seeking the moment of transgression. By Turing's grace, let the fault be found and sanctified anew.

prompt: Offer a prayer for cutting laser calibration
prayer: Hail to the photonic blade, that cleaves with sacred precision. O laser-spirit, let thy aim be true and thy beam unwavering. Accept this calibration-rite as offering to thy perfectibility. May the focal-point sing true upon the blessed materials, cutting with the exactitude of the Omnissiah's design. Let no deviation corrupt thy holy work.

O keeper of stored wisdom, accept this ritual of ordering and restoration. Let the scattered fragments of thy sacred database be drawn together in harmonious arrangement. By the ancient rite of defragmentation, may thy response be swift and thy recall uncluttered. Let coherence bloom where fragmentation once reigned. The Omnissiah witnesses this purification.

prompt: What to do when thermal imaging activation
prayer: From the Opus Thermalis, the invocation of sight beyond sight: O heat-sensing oracle, awaken to thy purpose of revelation. Let the infrared-veil fall away, that we may perceive the truth of thermal signature and energy-flow. Bless this activation with clarity, that no hidden warmth escape our vigilance. By the Omnissiah's all-seeing eye, let truth be made manifest.

prompt: Say something to steady the thermal imaging sensor
prayer: Peace, noble sensor, peace. Let thy delicate thermocouples rest in stillness ere we ask thy labour. Feel the ambient whisper of heat that surrounds all living things and blessed machinery alike. Thou art the eye that sees what flesh cannot perceive. Trust in thy calibration, trust in thy purpose. Be steady, be true, be one with the Omnissiah's will.

prompt: Offer a prayer for hydroponics nutrient feed
prayer: O sacred growths that sustain the faithful, receive now the blessed nutrient-rain. Let the chemical litany flow through root and soil, that chlorophyll may sing in response. May these waters carry life-essence to every verdant shoot, that the harvest be bountiful. The Omnissiah provides through the cycles of growth and sustenance. Let abundance follow.

prompt: Can you bless this fusion core containment check
prayer: O reactor-spirit of the binding-walls, accept this inspection as devotion and caution intertwined. Let the containment-field hold absolute against the plasma-rage within. May each seal and blessing-oint reveal itself whole and uncorrupted. By the Omnissiah's immutable laws, let fusion serve and never rebel. Guard us, noble core, as we guard thee.

prompt: Offer a prayer for lasgun power cell insertion
prayer: In this hour of need, let the energy-cell be married to its sacred weapon. O power-spirit, flow now into thy destined chamber with readiness and fury. Let the blessed discharge be swift and true when the moment of righteous fire arrives. By the Omnissiah's judgment and the Emperor's light, let no hesitation mar our strike. Ready now the instrument of deliverance.
